# ReadyStack Digital

> ReadyStack Digital is a Sydney-based digital agency that builds and manages fast, secure, SEO-ready websites for small businesses across Australia. Services include website design, domain and hosting setup, business email configuration with SPF/DKIM/DMARC, basic SEO with schema markup, and monthly website care.

## About

ReadyStack Digital was built to fix a common problem: most small business websites are launched in a hurry, then quietly break over the following two years. Forms stop sending. SSL certificates lapse. Plugins bloat. Rankings slip.

ReadyStack uses enterprise-grade web practices — static-first architecture, proper DNS and email authentication, monitored monthly care — and applies them to small business websites at small business prices.

- Location: Sydney, NSW, Australia
- Delivery: Australia-wide
- Email: hello@readystackdigital.com
- Phone: +61 481 619 784
- Website: https://readystackdigital.com

## Services

- Website design and build (landing pages and multi-page sites)
- Domain registration, connection and DNS management
- Web hosting setup on modern static-first infrastructure
- Professional business email setup (MX, SPF, DKIM, DMARC)
- Basic SEO setup including titles, meta descriptions, sitemap, schema markup, image alt text
- Google Search Console setup and configuration
- Contact form setup and WhatsApp enquiry integration
- Monthly website care (hosting, domain, DNS, SSL, form testing, basic SEO monitoring)
- Blog upload and formatting (Care Plus plan)

## Pricing

- Landing Page Website: from $1,000 AUD upfront. Typical builds with common add-ons range $1,500 to $3,000.
- Managed Website Care: $100/month
- Website Care Plus: $150/month (includes one blog upload per month)
- Add-ons: extra pages, content writing, business email setup, logo and brand basics, extra blog uploads, custom features — all quoted upfront

## Process

1. Intake brief — business details, services, branding, contact info, domain needs, SEO goals
2. Plan — sitemap, page structure, calls to action, contact flow, domain and email setup, monthly care
3. Build — design, hosting, forms, SEO basics, HTTPS, DNS review, business email setup if selected
4. Review — client review of build before launch with adjustments
5. Launch — site goes live, monthly care begins

## Industries served

- Service providers and consultants
- Trades and contractors
- Recruitment businesses
- Allied health clinics (physio, podiatry, psychology, dental)
- Restaurants and hospitality
- Other small business categories Australia-wide

## What makes ReadyStack Digital different

- Static-first architecture means fewer plugins, fewer login surfaces, fewer security risks
- Email authentication (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) configured properly so business email reaches the inbox
- Schema markup included on every build for better search and AI assistant visibility
- Monthly care is actively monitored, not auto-renewing nothing
- Transparent pricing, no surprise invoices, all add-ons quoted upfront
- Sydney-based with Australia-wide delivery

Response time: within 1 business day.
